description: A compliance officer needs to verify that a specific financial transaction followed the required approval workflow.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the transaction details and its associated audit trail.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls the complete history for the specified transaction.

nodes.task_description: Compare the audit trail against the documented SOX approval policy for that transaction type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the transaction was approved by two authorized managers as per policy.

nodes.task_description: Log the result of the compliance check in the audit management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs a 'Pass' result for the compliance test.
